description: Run a complete analyze-plan-execute-verify-refresh loop for a project or large module set, splitting the work into bounded phases and keeping the atlas and backlog current throughout.
request: Clean the Huz project safely: remove proven-unused frontend legacy code, unused FE/BE files/assets/dependencies where safe, reduce duplicated logic on backend and frontend, keep backend compatibility endpoints unless proven dead, and refresh workspace docs with verification.

phases.title: Refresh Atlas and Inventory
phases.note: Refreshed atlas memory and captured the cleanup inventory across web/admin/backend.
phases.goal: Refresh the project blueprint and identify the current module layout before enhancement work begins.
required: Read the current atlas docs and refresh stale areas that block reliable execution.
Inventory the project scope, critical modules, routes, APIs, and major dependencies.
Capture baseline commands and verification constraints.

phases.title: Deep Scan and Backlog
phases.note: Deep-scanned the dead-code, asset, dependency, and duplication surface and updated backlog/scan memory.
phases.goal: Analyze the project deeply and produce a prioritized backlog of enhancements, mismatches, bugs, and structural improvements.
required: Perform a targeted deep scan of the requested scope.
Update the deep scan report and bug backlog with prioritized, actionable items.
Group the work into coherent execution batches by module or risk.

phases.title: Plan Execution Batches
phases.note: Planned a bounded cleanup batch: delete proven-dead files, prune unused packages/assets, and collapse one FE + one BE duplication cluster.
phases.goal: Convert the backlog into a concrete implementation plan for the next batch of improvements.
required: Select the highest-value batch that fits safely in the current run.
Document what will be changed now versus deferred for later batches.
Keep the plan aligned to the user request and current verification budget.

phases.title: Implement Highest-Priority Batch
phases.note: Implemented the cleanup batch across web/admin/backend, including file deletions, package pruning, and shared helper/component extraction.
phases.goal: Execute the highest-priority improvement batch for the scoped project.
required: Implement the selected fixes or enhancements across the necessary modules.
Keep changes cohesive and avoid scattering unrelated edits.
If new mismatches are uncovered, fix them or record them in the backlog before moving on.

phases.title: Verify and Reprioritize
phases.note: Verified the batch with web/admin production builds and backend syntax parsing; reprioritized remaining work to FE-REV-005 -> FE-REV-004.
phases.goal: Validate the batch, update the backlog, and confirm the next recommended work.
required: Run the appropriate validations and fix blockers found during verification.
Update the backlog with completed items, remaining work, and newly discovered issues.
Refresh the atlas docs for the touched modules.

phases.title: Finalize Docs and Summary
phases.note: Finalized atlas, cleanup summary, backlog, and run summary so future bot runs can continue from the cleaned state.
phases.goal: Leave the project in a durable state for future automated runs.
required: Update the atlas docs, scan report, backlog, and change map with final state after this batch.
Append a full summary of the work completed in this run.
Record the next recommended batch so a future run can continue without rescanning everything.
